reasoning: Initial observation suggests a linear relationship between x, v, t, and x0. Increasing t might help us identify the relationship.
Increasing t from 2 to 3 resulted in x increasing from 10 to 15, suggesting that x is directly proportional to t. To confirm the relationship, I will now increase v.

The value of x has doubled when v was increased from 5 to 10, while t remained constant. This suggests that x is also directly proportional to v. Given the initial conditions and the changes, we can infer the equation x = v * t + x0.
